scripts.build:prod:darwin:linux: mvn clean deploy -DskipTests=$(build-env tests.run --not) -Dmaven.test.failure.ignore=$(build-env tests.ignoreFailures) -Dmaven.deploy.skip=$(build-env maven.deploy.skip) -Dversion.org.kie.kogito=$(build-env versions.kogito)
scripts.build:prod:win32: pnpm powershell "mvn clean deploy `-DskipTests=$(build-env tests.run --not) `-Dmaven.test.failure.ignore=$(build-env tests.ignoreFailures) `-Dmaven.deploy.skip=$(build-env maven.deploy.skip) `-Dversion.org.kie.kogito=$(build-env versions.kogito)"
